mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO product_options ( product_id, option_name, option_price, option_stock, sort_order ) VALUES
( #{option.product_id}, #{option.option_name}, #{option.option_price}, #{option.option_stock}, #{idx} + 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT option_id, product_id, option_name, option_price, option_stock, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM product_options WHERE product_id = #{product_id} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, option_id ASC
SELECT option_id, product_id, option_name, option_price, option_stock FROM product_options WHERE product_id = #{product_id} ORDER BY option_id ASC
SELECT option_id, product_id, option_name, option_price, option_stock FROM product_options WHERE option_id = #{option_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_options ( product_id, option_name, option_price, option_stock ) VALUES ( #{product_id}, #{option_name}, #{option_price}, #{option_stock} )
